docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHEUNG, BENNY AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JONG DBA JB ROOFING CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, BENNY AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JONG DBA JB ROOFING CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, BENNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, JONG DBA JB ROOFING CO. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,585.00, BASED ON DOCUMENTED DAMAGE AND LICENSE BOARD FINDINGS REGARDING DEFECTIVE REPAIR, DEFENDANT IS LIABLE FOR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGE TO INTERIOR OF DWELLING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-19-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JONG DBA JB ROOFING CO.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-21-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-21-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: GEOFFREY HOWARD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JONG DBA JB ROOFING CO.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2009 - JUDGMENT.
